ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_resources" (
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant that this resource belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for operations on the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource's purpose and usage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., network, storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_resources_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the tenant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the tenant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource this operation belongs to */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., GET, POST, PUT) */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for the operation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the operation was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the operation was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_operations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "port_groups" (
  "port_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each port group */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant that this port group belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the port group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port group's purpose and usage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the port group was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the port group was last updated */,
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* VLAN ID associated with the port group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_groups_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_group_id" TEXT /* ID of the port group this port belongs to */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port's purpose and usage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the port was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the port was last updated */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_port_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_group_id") REFERENCES port_groups ("port_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tenant admin, service provider admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this access control belongs to */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource this access control applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access control was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation log */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the operation log was created */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Response code of the operation (e.g., 200, 404) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES resource_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "port_membership_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "port_group_id" TEXT /* ID of the port group this operation belongs to */,
  "port_id" TEXT /* ID of the port involved in the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the port membership operation was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the port membership operation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_membership_operations_port_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_group_id") REFERENCES port_groups ("port_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_membership_operations_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent resource */,
  "child_resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the child resource */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent/child, related resource) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource relationship was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_relationships_parent_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_relationships_child_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenant_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant this permission belongs to */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource this permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_permissions_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the version history */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this change belongs to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES resource_versions ("version_id")
)
